prompt: A museum gallery hall with a massive oil painting in an ornate golden frame mounted on the wall, depicting a dramatic naval battle with tall sailing ships, cannon smoke, and stormy dark seas. Dim gallery lighting from above, polished wooden floor. Behind the viewer, a padded bench for gallery visitors sits in the center of the room, and additional framed paintings of maritime scenes and pastoral landscapes hang on the opposite wall. A doorway with a velvet rope leads into the adjacent exhibition hall. First-person viewer. First-person view at eye level, standing very close to the large painting so that it fills most of the frame.

tracking_object.desc: massive oil painting depicting a naval battle on the museum wall

scene_adherence.visible_part: A museum gallery hall contains a massive oil painting in an ornate golden frame. The painting depicts a dramatic naval battle with tall sailing ships, cannon smoke, and stormy dark seas. The gallery has a polished wooden floor.
scene_adherence.offscreen_part: Dim gallery lighting comes from above the hall. The oil painting is mounted on the wall. Behind the viewer, a padded bench for gallery visitors sits in the center of the room. Additional framed paintings of maritime scenes and pastoral landscapes hang on the opposite wall. A doorway with a velvet rope leads into the adjacent exhibition hall.
